ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Confirm Customer Satisfaction.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(RecordType.Name = "Growth Opportunity") && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Negotiate Contract & Close") && (ISNULL(Verbal_Award_Date__c) || ISNULL(Expected_Sign_Date__c) || ISNULL(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required: RFP Process, Proposal Financial Terms, Data Extract Received, Proposal Date, Patient Collections, Margin, Annual Encounters, Subsidy, Verbal Award Date, Expected Sign Date, Target Contract Start Date, Contract Signed Date & Actual Start Date.
